title: HorScore
description: Shows a score out of 10 when looking at a horse.
body:
## HorScore
A simple and efficient client-side mod that displays **horse statistics** while you look at them in Minecraft.
HorScore evaluates horses by their speed and jump height, giving them a score from 0 to 10. When you look at a horse (aim your crosshair at it), the mod displays:

- **HorScore**: An overall color-coded rating combining speed and jump ability (0-10 scale)
- **Speed** (S): The horse's movement speed in _blocks per second_
- **Jump** (J): The horse's maximum jump height in _blocks_

![Displayed data of a horse in-game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d76ac43998a7ca298e264a6229088e08bdd719d7.png)

## How to use

1. Install the mod with Fabric Loader
2. Look at any horse in-game
3. Stats will appear above your crosshair automatically
4. Press **H to toggle the mod on/off** (you can change this key in Controls settings)
#
Made by XDamagre
